title: Hire a skilled worker to support their permanent residency – Recruitment and Advertisement - Canada.ca
content:
## Hire a skilled worker to support their permanent residency: Recruitment and advertisement
- 2. Program requirements
- 3. Wages, working conditions and occupations
- 4. Recruitment and advertisement
- 5. Apply for a Labour Market Impact Assessment

## 4. Recruitment and advertisement
Employers must conduct recruitment efforts  to hire Canadians and permanent residents before offering a job to foreign  workers.
Employers offering a wage to a temporary  foreign worker that is:
- below the provincial or territorial wage threshold must meet the advertisement  and recruitment requirements of the stream for low-wage positions
- at or above the provincial or territorial wage threshold must  meet the advertisement and recruitment requirements of the stream for high-wage positions
